summary: Close the final M2 internationalization-catalog preflight finding by formatting the ready-engine version status through the English message catalog.
specSections: Section 2.7 test-first evidence and milestone gates

decisions.decision: Define the version-bearing ready status as an English-catalog formatter and require App composition to call it with the probed pinned-engine version.
decisions.rationale: The version is runtime data, but the surrounding user-visible wording is product copy governed by N-4. Keeping the formatter in the existing catalog closes the remaining inline construction without changing the displayed text or engine-health behavior.

testEvidence.test: Spy on the catalog formatter while App transitions from checking to a ready pinned engine, then require the formatted status to be visible.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/app/App.test.tsx -t "formats the ready engine status through the message catalog" --reporter=verbose
red.outcome: ASSERTION-LEVEL RED: Test Files 1 failed; the focused test failed because the engineReady catalog property did not exist. Fifteen unrelated App tests were skipped by the name filter.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/app/App.test.tsx -t "formats the ready engine status through the message catalog" --reporter=verbose; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: the focused App test passed with 15 skipped by the name filter; TypeScript exited 0; Biome checked 296 files with no fixes; source policy passed.

questions: This catalog correction changes no engine pin, readiness state, or visible English text.
No owner similarity gate, comparison repository, workflow content, or prohibited source was opened or executed.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
